content.body:
When .leo/ exists and --force is not given, init now skips scaffold
and config writing but returns nil so the caller can still run
bootstrap if the user opted in during the wizard.

Previously this was a hard error, which blocked re-running init just
to trigger bootstrap on an existing install.
content.subject: fix(init): skip scaffold gracefully when .leo/ already exists
content.summary:
